content.full_text:
May 23, 2014

Brian Pierik
Burke, Williams & Sorenson, LLP
2310 East Ponderosa Drive – Suite 25
Camarillo, CA 93010-4747

RE: Your Request for Advice – Thomas O’Malley
Our File No. W-14-048

Dear Mr. Pierik:

The purpose of this correspondence is to inform you that since we have not received word from you since our last correspondence, our email of April 30, 2014, we have withdrawn your request for advice.

However, if at a later date you determine that you do desire advice, you may simply request it anew at that time.

If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Zackery P. Morazzini
General Counsel

By: Valentina Joyce
Counsel, Legal Division

VJ:jgl
